evidence.title: README (segment 1)
evidence.excerpt: **Contributions:** Suggestions and improvements for this task view are very welcome and can be made through issues or pull requests here on GitHub or via e-mail to the maintainer address. For further details see the [Web Technologies Contributing](https://github.com/cran-task-views/WebTechnologies/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) and/or the [Task View Contributing](https://github.com/cran-task-views/ctv/blob/main/Contributing.md) guide. All contributions must adhere to the [code of conduct](https://github.com/cran-task-views/ctv/blob/main/CodeOfConduct.md).
